hops.context: We compare our model to existing image-conditional panorama image generation model, MVDiffusion.
We note that our model outperforms 360DVD across all metrics.
360DVD (Wang et al., 2024a) that is our primary baseline.

question: In the context of comparing image-conditional panorama image generation models, what is the relationship between MVDiffusion and 360DVD as described?

options.A: Both MVDiffusion and OursMultiTask are types of datasets similar to 360DVD.
options.B: MVDiffusion serves as a comparative model to OursMultiTask, which in turn outperforms the 360DVD dataset.
options.C: MVDiffusion and 360DVD are competing models with no direct performance comparison available.
options.D: 360DVD outperforms MVDiffusion in all metrics, serving as a superior model in the panorama image generation.

explanation: The correct answer, A, summarizes the relationships indicated in the knowledge graph path. 'MVDiffusion' is compared with 'OursMultiTask,' which subsequently outperforms '360DVD,' categorized as a dataset. This path of comparison and outperformance is correctly captured only in option A.
